positive: A vibrant, isolated arrangement of various gourmet pastries (croissants, macarons, donuts) dusted with powdered sugar, presented on a rustic marble slab. Food photography style, bright natural lighting, shallow depth of field, highly appetizing.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy, dark, oil paint, abstract
